task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully accessed the OpenC3 COSMOS application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the OpenC3 COSMOS dashboard or main interface loaded in a web browser.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent determined the configured target names in the system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the agent navigating to the OpenC3 COSMOS 'Targets' page, 'CmdTlm Server', or using a tool that lists the configured system targets.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent checked the connection state of the interfaces and their associated targets.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the OpenC3 COSMOS 'Interfaces' tab or 'CmdTlm Server' screen showing interface names, their states (e.g., CONNECTED, DISCONNECTED), and target mappings.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent confirmed active data flow by reading TEMP1 and TEMP2 from the INST HEALTH_STATUS packet.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the OpenC3 COSMOS 'Telemetry Viewer', 'Packet Viewer', or similar tool displaying the 'INST' target, 'HEALTH_STATUS' packet, and the current numeric values for 'TEMP1' and 'TEMP2'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent created the formal JSON report with all required top-level keys.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor or terminal showing the file 'system_readiness.json' containing the exact keys: 'audit_time', 'targets', 'interfaces', 'telemetry_check', and 'system_ready'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually interacted with OpenC3 COSMOS to gather the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the OpenC3 COSMOS web interface being actively used to view targets, interfaces, and telemetry, rather than hallucinating the data.

integrity.description: Verify the telemetry values in the report come from the live system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The TEMP1 and TEMP2 values written in the final JSON file should match the values visible in the OpenC3 COSMOS Telemetry Viewer screenshots.

integrity.description: Verify the JSON report was saved to the exact requested path.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text editor, terminal, or file manager must clearly show the file is located at /home/ga/Desktop/system_readiness.json.
